title: Bacteria Colony/Liqiud PCR
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9rlgl","text":"Colony PCR using DreamTaq Green PCR mastermix (based on manufacturer ThermoFisher Scientific protocol).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: For 1 PCR reaction, mix the following - multiply the amounts for the number of reactions you need, prepare 1.1x the final volume needed for your reactions: %s %s Taq Mix (2X) 10 ul forward primer (10 uM) 1 ul reverse primer (10 uM 1 ul Bacteria Colony or Liqiud 1ul ddH20 7 ul Total 20 ul

PCR cycling protocol: (Use the lower Tm value of your primer pair) %s %s step temperature time number of cycles initial denaturation 94°C 10min 1 denaturation 94°C 30s annealing Tm-5°C 30s 25-35 extension 72°C 1min/kb final extension 72°C 10min 1 hold 4°C ∞ 1
creator: Fankang Meng
